iti108:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti108:2.1: “Monks, any monks who are deceitful, stubborn, talkers, frauds, arrogant, & uncentered are not followers of mine.
iti108:2.2:
They have turned away from this Dhamma-&-Vinaya.
They attain, in terms of this Dhamma-&-Vinaya, no growth, increase, or abundance.
iti108:2.3:
“But any monks who are not deceitful, not talkers, who are enlightened, pliant, & well-centered:
they are followers of mine.
iti108:2.4:
They have not turned away from this Dhamma-&-Vinaya.
They attain, in terms of this Dhamma-&-Vinaya, growth, increase, & abundance.
iti108:3.3: they don’t grow in the Dhamma
iti108:3.4: taught by the Rightly Self-awakened One.
iti108:4.1: Not deceitful, not talkers, enlightened, pliant,
iti108:4.4: taught by the One Rightly Self-awakened.
